cntPhone.voiceNum: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

dataIdInfo.idAbs: The TrailNFS_Publish Layer is designed to provide information about National Forest System trail locations and characteristics to the public. When fully realized, it will describe trail locations, basic characteristics of the trail, and where and when various trail uses are prohibited, allowed and encouraged. Because the data readiness varies between Forests, each Forest will approve which level of attribute subset are published for that forest. Forests can provide no information or one of three attribute subsets describing trails. The attribute subsets include TrailNFS_Centerline which includes the location and trail name and number; TrailNFS_Basic which adds information about basic trail characteristics; and TrailNFS_Mgmt which adds information about where and when users are prohibited, allowed, and encouraged. When a Forest chooses to provide the highest attribute subset, TrailNFS_Mgmt, these attributes must be consistent with the Forest's published Motorized Vehicle Use Map (MVUM).
dataIdInfo.idPurp: The TrailNFS_Publish Layer is designed to provide information about National Forest System trail locations and characteristics to the public. When fully realized, it will describe trail locations, basic characteristics of the trail, and where and when various trail uses are prohibited, allowed and encouraged. Because the data readiness varies between Forests, each Forest will approve which level of attribute subset are published for that forest. Forests can provide no information or one of three attribute subsets describing trails. The attribute subsets include TrailNFS_Centerline which includes the location and trail name and number; TrailNFS_Basic which adds information about basic trail characteristics; and TrailNFS_Mgmt which adds information about where and when users are prohibited, allowed, and encouraged. When a Forest chooses to provide the highest attribute subset, TrailNFS_Mgmt, these attributes must be consistent with the Forest's published Motorized Vehicle Use Map (MVUM).

cntPhone.voiceNum: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

Reference to any specific commercial products, processes, or services, or the use of any trade, firm or corporation name is for the information and convenience of the public, and does not constitute endorsement or recommendation by the USDA Forest Service.

enttyp.enttypd: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The name that the trail or trail segment is officially or legally known by.
A (required) category that reflects the predominant trail surface and general mode of travel accommodated by a trail

edom.edomvd: A trail that has a surface consisting predominantly of snow or ice and that is designed and managed to accommodate use on that surface.
A trail that has a surface consisting predominantly of water (but may include land-based portages) and that is designed and managed to accommodate use on that surface.
A trail that has a surface consisting predominantly of the ground and that is designed and managed to accommodate use on that surface.

attr.attrdef: Control number generated in Oracle to uniquely identify each trail across all Forest Service units.
Beginning measure point for the segment.

attrdomv.udom: Beginning measure point for the segment.

attr.attrdef: End measure point for the trail segment.

attrdomv.udom: End measure point for the trail segment.

attr.attrdef: The administrative unit within the Forest Service where the trail or trail segment physically resides.

attrdomv.udom: The six digit code is composed of a two digit Region code, a two digit National Forest code, and a two digit Ranger District code.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where ATV use is allowed, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which ATV use is accepted.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where ATV use is discouraged, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which ATV use is discouraged

attr.attrdef: The official numeric or alphanumeric identifier for the trail.
The length of the feature in miles, calculated in North American Albers Equal Area Conic projection (NAD83) meters and then converted to miles with the formula LengthMeters / 1609.344.

attrdomv.udom: Length of the trail segment, in miles, as calculated by the GIS. This can be different than the segment length which can be measured in a variety of ways.
